/usr/bin/c++  -rdynamic -O2 -fPIC -ggdb -Wall -Wno-deprecated -Wno-unused-function -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-builtin-macro-redefined -faligned-new CMakeFiles/kv_server.dir/examples/kv_server.cc.o -o /home/wangmaosen/project/kv/bac/bin/kv_server  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wangmaosen/project/kv/bac/lib -ldl -lpthread -lyaml-cpp -ljsoncpp /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lluajit-5.1 -lmysqlclient /home/wangmaosen/project/kv/bac/lib/libzero.so -ldl -lpthread -lyaml-cpp -ljsoncpp /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lluajit-5.1 -lmysqlclient
